function.name: skill_manage
function.arguments: {"action":"patch","name":"verified-algebra-workflow","new_string":"  3. **Headline number reproducible from a recoverable artifact.** A manuscript number is verified only when generating code and inputs are recoverable. **Updated 2026-07-14:** the historical `6.13e-6` quark fit now meets that reproducibility condition through `locked_historical_fts_diagnostic_fit.json`, `historical_hermes_general_fts_state_recovered.py`, and `verify_locked_historical_fts_fit.py`; fresh end-to-end execution gives Frobenius `6.1281124074e-6`. This upgrades the number from `UNVERIFIED_BY_REPRODUCIBLE_ARTIFACT` to **REPRODUCED_HISTORICAL_DIAGNOSTIC_FIT_NOT_DERIVATION**. It does not remove target leakage or establish prediction.","old_string":"  3. **Headline number reproducible from a recoverable artifact** — a number asserted in an arXiv manuscript is NOT verified unless the generating code AND inputs (e.g. the shared-frame `Q`) are recoverable. This session `connelly_fts_ckm_arxiv_2026.tex` asserts the 6.13e-6 CKM fit, but ALL `hermes-verify-*.py` generators were deleted from Temp and the frame `Q` was never published → **UNVERIFIED_BY_REPRODUCIBLE_ARTIFACT**. Record the gap; do not certify."}

parsed_arguments.name: verified-algebra-workflow
parsed_arguments.new_string: 3. **Headline number reproducible from a recoverable artifact.** A manuscript number is verified only when generating code and inputs are recoverable. **Updated 2026-07-14:** the historical `6.13e-6` quark fit now meets that reproducibility condition through `locked_historical_fts_diagnostic_fit.json`, `historical_hermes_general_fts_state_recovered.py`, and `verify_locked_historical_fts_fit.py`; fresh end-to-end execution gives Frobenius `6.1281124074e-6`. This upgrades the number from `UNVERIFIED_BY_REPRODUCIBLE_ARTIFACT` to **REPRODUCED_HISTORICAL_DIAGNOSTIC_FIT_NOT_DERIVATION**. It does not remove target leakage or establish prediction.
parsed_arguments.old_string: 3. **Headline number reproducible from a recoverable artifact** — a number asserted in an arXiv manuscript is NOT verified unless the generating code AND inputs (e.g. the shared-frame `Q`) are recoverable. This session `connelly_fts_ckm_arxiv_2026.tex` asserts the 6.13e-6 CKM fit, but ALL `hermes-verify-*.py` generators were deleted from Temp and the frame `Q` was never published → **UNVERIFIED_BY_REPRODUCIBLE_ARTIFACT**. Record the gap; do not certify.
